# TechOptiCore LLC

TechOptiCore LLC is a boutique consulting firm providing fractional IT leadership and strategic technology consulting services. We specialize in helping financial services and mid-market organizations modernize their infrastructure, optimize costs, and leverage AI to drive business value.

## Core Services

- **Fractional CIO/CTO:** Strategic IT leadership for organizations without full-time C-level requirements.
- **IT Strategy & Roadmap:** Developing technology roadmaps aligned with business objectives.
- **Cost Optimization:** Identifying inefficiencies and optimizing technology spend.
- **AI Implementation:** Strategically integrating AI to improve operational efficiency and digital employee experience.
